---
title: "8 May 2026: Currently working"
author: "Eve Ansell"
date: "2026-05-08"
categories: [week_notes]
---

Crating continues.....

Something about data verification. Which is to say.. making sure we know where our Federal Hansard gaps are....

Making the website better, a good task for when we have no brain left for data wrangling...
